title: galbanum daucoides
intro: Galbanum daucoides, also known as Galbanum, is a perennial herb native to the Middle East and Mediterranean regions, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). Galbanum has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Galbanum include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing. Galbanum is traditionally prepared as an essential oil, used in aromatherapy and herbal remedies, and can also be used in tinctures and infusions for its medicinal benefits.
